types.name: CreateChatCompletionResponse

fields.name: id
fields.description: A unique identifier for the chat completion.

fields.name: choices
fields.description: A list of chat completion choices. Can be more than one if `n` is greater than 1.

fields.name: created
fields.description: The Unix timestamp (in seconds) of when the chat completion was created.

fields.name: model
fields.description: The model used for the chat completion.

fields.name: system_fingerprint
fields.description:
This fingerprint represents the backend configuration that the model runs with.

Can be used in conjunction with the `seed` request parameter to understand when backend changes have been made that might impact determinism.

fields.name: object
fields.description: The object type, which is always `chat.completion`.

types.description: Represents a chat completion response returned by model, based on the provided input.

fields.name: finish_reason
fields.description:
The reason the model stopped generating tokens. This will be `stop` if the model hit a natural stop point or a provided stop sequence,
`length` if the maximum number of tokens specified in the request was reached,
`content_filter` if content was omitted due to a flag from our content filters,
`tool_calls` if the model called a tool, or `function_call` (deprecated) if the model called a function.

fields.name: index
fields.description: The index of the choice in the list of choices.

types.name: CreateChatCompletionResponseChoicesItemFinishReason
types.description:
The reason the model stopped generating tokens. This will be `stop` if the model hit a natural stop point or a provided stop sequence,
`length` if the maximum number of tokens specified in the request was reached,
`content_filter` if content was omitted due to a flag from our content filters,
`tool_calls` if the model called a tool, or `function_call` (deprecated) if the model called a function.

types.name: ChatCompletionResponseMessage

fields.name: annotations
fields.description:
Annotations for the message, when applicable, as when using the
[web search tool](/docs/guides/tools-web-search?api-mode=chat).

fields.name: role
fields.description: The role of the author of this message.

fields.name: function_call
fields.description: Deprecated and replaced by `tool_calls`. The name and arguments of a function that should be called, as generated by the model.

types.description: A chat completion message generated by the model.

types.name: ChatCompletionMessageToolCall

fields.name: id
fields.description: The ID of the tool call.

fields.name: type
fields.description: The type of the tool. Currently, only `function` is supported.

fields.name: function
fields.description: The function that the model called.

types.description: A call to a function tool created by the model.

types.name: ChatCompletionMessageToolCallFunction

fields.name: name
fields.description: The name of the function to call.

fields.name: arguments
fields.description: The arguments to call the function with, as generated by the model in JSON format. Note that the model does not always generate valid JSON, and may hallucinate parameters not defined by your function schema. Validate the arguments in your code before calling your function.

types.description: The function that the model called.

types.name: ChatCompletionMessageCustomToolCall

fields.name: id
fields.description: The ID of the tool call.

fields.name: type
fields.description: The type of the tool. Always `custom`.

fields.name: custom
fields.description: The custom tool that the model called.

types.description: A call to a custom tool created by the model.

types.name: ChatCompletionMessageCustomToolCallCustom

fields.name: name
fields.description: The name of the custom tool to call.

fields.name: input
fields.description: The input for the custom tool call generated by the model.

types.description: The custom tool that the model called.

types.name: ChatCompletionResponseMessageAnnotationsItem

fields.name: type
fields.description: The type of the URL citation. Always `url_citation`.

fields.name: url_citation
fields.description: A URL citation when using web search.

types.description: A URL citation when using web search.

types.name: ChatCompletionResponseMessageAnnotationsItemUrlCitation

fields.name: end_index
fields.description: The index of the last character of the URL citation in the message.

fields.name: start_index
fields.description: The index of the first character of the URL citation in the message.

fields.name: url
fields.description: The URL of the web resource.

fields.name: title
fields.description: The title of the web resource.

types.description: A URL citation when using web search.

types.name: ChatCompletionResponseMessageFunctionCall

fields.name: arguments
fields.description: The arguments to call the function with, as generated by the model in JSON format. Note that the model does not always generate valid JSON, and may hallucinate parameters not defined by your function schema. Validate the arguments in your code before calling your function.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The name of the function to call.

types.description: Deprecated and replaced by `tool_calls`. The name and arguments of a function that should be called, as generated by the model.

types.name: ChatCompletionResponseMessageAudio

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this audio response.

fields.name: expires_at
fields.description:
The Unix timestamp (in seconds) for when this audio response will
no longer be accessible on the server for use in multi-turn
conversations.

fields.name: data
fields.description:
Base64 encoded audio bytes generated by the model, in the format
specified in the request.

fields.name: transcript
fields.description: Transcript of the audio generated by the model.

types.description:
If the audio output modality is requested, this object contains data
about the audio response from the model. [Learn more](/docs/guides/audio).

types.name: CreateChatCompletionResponseChoicesItemLogprobs
types.description: Log probability information for the choice.

fields.name: token
fields.description: The token.

fields.name: logprob
fields.description: The log probability of this token, if it is within the top 20 most likely tokens. Otherwise, the value `-9999.0` is used to signify that the token is very unlikely.

fields.name: top_logprobs
fields.description: List of the most likely tokens and their log probability, at this token position. The number of entries may be fewer than the requested `top_logprobs`.

fields.name: token
fields.description: The token.

fields.name: logprob
fields.description: The log probability of this token, if it is within the top 20 most likely tokens. Otherwise, the value `-9999.0` is used to signify that the token is very unlikely.

types.name: ServiceTier
types.description:
Specifies the processing type used for serving the request.
  - If set to 'auto', then the request will be processed with the service tier configured in the Project settings. Unless otherwise configured, the Project will use 'default'.
  - If set to 'default', then the request will be processed with the standard pricing and performance for the selected model.
  - If set to '[flex](/docs/guides/flex-processing)' or '[priority](https://openai.com/api-priority-processing/)', then the request will be processed with the corresponding service tier.
  - When not set, the default behavior is 'auto'.

  When the `service_tier` parameter is set, the response body will include the `service_tier` value based on the processing mode actually used to serve the request. This response value may be different from the value set in the parameter.

types.name: CompletionUsage

fields.name: completion_tokens
fields.description: Number of tokens in the generated completion.

fields.name: prompt_tokens
fields.description: Number of tokens in the prompt.

fields.name: total_tokens
fields.description: Total number of tokens used in the request (prompt + completion).

fields.name: completion_tokens_details
fields.description: Breakdown of tokens used in a completion.

fields.name: prompt_tokens_details
fields.description: Breakdown of tokens used in the prompt.

types.description: Usage statistics for the completion request.

types.name: CompletionUsageCompletionTokensDetails

fields.name: accepted_prediction_tokens
fields.description:
When using Predicted Outputs, the number of tokens in the
prediction that appeared in the completion.

fields.name: audio_tokens
fields.description: Audio input tokens generated by the model.

fields.name: reasoning_tokens
fields.description: Tokens generated by the model for reasoning.

fields.name: rejected_prediction_tokens
fields.description:
When using Predicted Outputs, the number of tokens in the
prediction that did not appear in the completion. However, like
reasoning tokens, these tokens are still counted in the total
completion tokens for purposes of billing, output, and context window
limits.

types.description: Breakdown of tokens used in a completion.

types.name: CompletionUsagePromptTokensDetails

fields.name: audio_tokens
fields.description: Audio input tokens present in the prompt.

fields.name: cached_tokens
fields.description: Cached tokens present in the prompt.

types.description: Breakdown of tokens used in the prompt.

methods.description:
Get a stored chat completion. Only Chat Completions that have been created
with the `store` parameter set to `true` will be returned.

pathParams.name: completion_id
pathParams.description: The ID of the chat completion to retrieve.
